---
applyTo: "README.md,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,.claude/**/*.md,.github/**/*.md,skills/**/*.md"
---

# Learning content instructions

When editing teaching content in this repository:

- prefer "real example first" over abstract explanation
- keep file paths exact
- keep repo trees synchronized with actual files
- explain what a file is for in one clear sentence before expanding
- do not reintroduce removed folders or stale paths
- do not claim that a file is official unless it is actually supported by the relevant tool
- keep Markdown easy to scan and easy to copy into another repository
